project.name: Adhish Kacker Portfolio
project.domain: Premium Personal Brand / B2B SaaS Portfolio

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use Sora for a wide-stance geometric presence. Ensure text scale maxes at text-5xl to text-6xl.

body.rules: Highly legible, perfectly neutral to offset the wide headings.

typography.hierarchy_rules: Max heading size text-5xl to text-6xl. Do not use 7xl+. Ensure hierarchy gap is max 2 Tailwind steps.

brand_gradient.usage: Use ONLY for the Hero Mesh, hover states on interactive cards, and text-gradient on key metrics. DO NOT overuse.

colors.rules: Tinted greys rule: Base dark mode is deep navy-tinted #0B1020, not pure black.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for standard sections, py-24 to py-32 for vertical section gaps.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A: Tetris) for Work and Expertise sections. Mix spans: col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create tension.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and cards. Optical alignment over geometric.

surfaces.sticky_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism. Light: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Dark: bg-[#0B1020]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5.
surfaces.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile variant. Flat background (surface color), subtle 1px border. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow with brand gradient border reveal via group-hover.

motion.hero: Framer Motion 3D or intricate CSS animated mesh gradient background for 'Turning Products Into Market Leaders'.
motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling required. Staggered fade-up entrances for timeline and case study cards.
motion.micro_interactions: Cards feature the 'Tracing Beam' or subtle glow on hover. Interactive floating cards in the hero.

components.Hero: Animated gradient mesh background (opacity 20% in light mode, 40% in dark mode) so text is highly readable. Floating expertise cards using Framer Motion.
components.StickyNavigation: Glassmorphism header, z-50. Links: Home, About, Expertise, Work, Case Studies, Articles, Resume, Contact. Primary CTA: 'Book a Conversation'.
components.AboutTimeline: Vertical chronological timeline. Sharp geometric points. Left-aligned content. Focus on hybrid.ai, Mitgo, Marriott, IHG, Aditya Birla.
components.ExpertiseCards: Bento grid. Interactive hover states showing the accent gradient.
components.WorkShowcase: Case study cards using abstract 3D images. On click, expands (dialog or inline expand) to show Challenge/Strategy/Execution/Results and a Download PDF button.
components.ArticlesSection: Grid of external links. Cards feature publication name as Overline (tracking-widest uppercase), title, thumbnail, and 'Read ↗' button.
components.MetricsCounters: Animated number counters triggered on scroll using react-countup or framer-motion.
components.Testimonials: Carousel or stacked masonry. Use large quote marks (text-6xl) in brand gradient.
components.ContactForm: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Minimalist floating labels or clean input fields. Stores in MongoDB.
components.Footer: Massive bottom padding (py-32). Large typography 'Let's Talk' (text-5xl).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

hero_backgrounds.description: Vibrant 3D rendering of an abstract wave-like gradient in purple and orange hues. Perfect for the hero mesh or case study abstract thumbnails.

abstract_thumbnails.description: Colorful abstract 3D rendering for Work Showcase cards.
Minimalist architectural detail for 'Context Is King' or structural case studies.

portraits.description: Professional modern portrait placeholder for Adhish Kacker.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter for any headings. Strictly use Sora for headings and Manrope for body text.

Implement the specific brand gradient (#5B0FFF to #FF6B35) carefully. It should not overwhelm the UI. Keep 80% of the UI clean (white/stone or dark navy) and use the gradient for the hero mesh, accents, and hover states.
For the Timeline logos (Marriott, etc.), use clean typography-based logos (e.g., text-xl font-bold tracking-tight) instead of messy colored PNGs to maintain the high-end B2B aesthetic.
Use standard pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding rigid generic cards. Embrace asymmetry in the Work and Expertise sections using Bento Grid Protocol.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, and forms.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all standard icons, and 'framer-motion' for the floating cards and scroll reveals.
